Clump_Thickness.description: Measure of thickness of cell clusters, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Cell_Size_Uniformity.description: Uniformity in size of the cells, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Cell_Shape_Uniformity.description: Uniformity in shape of the cells, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Marginal_Adhesion.description: Adhesion of cells at their margins, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Single_Epi_Cell_Size.description: Size of epithelial cells, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Bare_Nuclei.description: Count of nuclei without cytoplasm, scaled to 10 distinct levels (16 missing values)

Bland_Chromatin.description: Texture of chromatin in the cell nucleus, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Normal_Nucleoli.description: Presence of nucleoli in the nucleus, scaled to 10 distinct levels

Mitoses.description: Frequency of mitotic cell division, scaled to 9 distinct levels
